theme: Reach a local demo from a second machine over Tailscale — a field-hardening release (v1.3b/v1.10b/v2.1 lineage). M212 (public-host knob: one opt-in --public-host <magicdns>, default UNSET = byte-identical to today) -> M213 (auth/TLS over the tailnet: Clerkenstein fake-fapi/handshake reachable behind tailscale serve on a trusted LE cert, the clerkjs proxy-transparency surface) -> M214 (CORS + the ant-academy demo-patch + the NEW corpus/ops/demo/tailscale-serve.md) -> M215 (iterative acceptance closer: the FIRST remote Linux-VM demo deploy PROVEN live over Tailscale for BOTH vantages on a trusted cert, cold reset-to-seed reproducible, + 13 findings propagated to tools+KB+skills). Tooling (rext) + docs (rosetta) ONLY -> ZERO platform-repo edits. ZERO net-new third-party deps.
code_location: TWO-REPO split. rext code-of-record (SEPARATE gitignored git repo at .agentspace/rosetta-extensions — the tag IS the record): rosetta-extensions @ annotated tag panorama-m215 = HEAD 00ba6b6 (FROZEN at M215 close; the rext v2.2 re-tag + the box-level .agentspace/rext.tag bump from v2.1 are /developer-kit:close-release's job). The v2.2 rext delta is the tailscale-serve/public-host tooling: stack-injection gen_tailscale_serve.py (+ --reset) + apply_authn; demo-stack up-injected.sh (preflight_host_prereqs + ensure_ssh_agent + precreate_linux_data_dirs + the F3 build-tag resolver + F12 up-path serve pre-reset) + migrate-demo.sh fail-loud + rosetta-demo cmd_down serve-reset; clerkenstein clerk-frontend clerkjs-proxy + /sign-in|/sign-up portal-fallback handshake. Per-milestone tags: panorama-m212 / -m213 / -m214 / -m215. rosetta doc-half: release/02.20-panorama (design + 4 milestone branches merged --no-ff).

measured_at.runner_toolchain: go1.25.3 darwin/arm64; python3.12.9 + pytest 9.0.3 (box-default python3 is 3.14 with no pytest); node v22.22.0 + playwright. The release toolchain-of-record pin is /developer-kit:close-release's to set.

ts_e2e.delta_vs_prev_release: FLAT — byte-identical. `git diff --stat quick-change-m211..HEAD` over stack-verify/e2e + playthroughs/e2e *.ts is EMPTY: ZERO TS files changed in the whole panorama range (M212 touched zero TS; M213 was Go-only on the TS-adjacent surface; M214/M215 metrics both record 'touched ZERO TS'). The suite is therefore definitionally unchanged from v2.1.
ts_e2e.reconciliation_note: v2.1's release metrics recorded ts_unit=103 (stack-verify/e2e 45 + playthroughs/e2e 58) via a grep/unit-level method; this pass re-measures the SAME (byte-identical) tree with `playwright test --list` and gets 124 (56 + 68). The 103->124 gap is a MEASUREMENT-METHOD difference, NOT a code change — the v2.1 tree lists identically at 124 because 0 TS files differ. No regression: the suite is flat, and even at face value 124 > 103 is an increase, never a decrease.
